hero.intro: Check channel cards — the batch flow confirms in a summary. For Instagram and WhatsApp Status, the most reliable path is still paste from the clipboard (same principles as above).

trustBanner.title: Our trust claim · this page
bullets: Your text fields and the links we build are not POSTed to Vanguard — we only assemble them in the browser.
Clipboard + tab opens stay on your device; privacy on Instagram, WhatsApp Web, etc. belongs to those platforms.
The unified preview’s “Verify clipboard” transparently compares the first 280 characters.

policyCard.title: Tabs & clipboard policy
steps: After confirm, the combined text hits the clipboard first (sync fallback + Clipboard API attempt).
The first N tabs open in one click burst — you pick N in the summary (default up to 5).
If checked, remaining URLs arrive on a short-delay second clipboard pass (paste into apps first).
If the browser blocks multiple tabs, allow pop-ups from the address bar.

safari.body: iOS Safari sometimes blocks rapid window.open calls; the clipboard always remains the backup. Lower “first tabs to open” or leave remainder URLs on the clipboard. You may need to allow clipboard read for this site (Settings → Safari → Advanced).

notSentChecklist.title: What never hits Vanguard servers on this screen
items: Title, main text, link, hashtag and CTA fields
Clipboard contents (written only to your device clipboard)
Your selected channel list (session memory only, optional “skip summary” preference)

footer.privacyBody: This screen’s form fields are not sent to the Vanguard API; they are merged only in the browser. Clipboard writes and tab opens stay on your device. We did not add product analytics specific to this page; third-party sites you open have their own cookies and policies.
footer.brandBody: Logos for Instagram, WhatsApp, YouTube, Facebook, LinkedIn and others belong to their owners. Vanguard is not an official product of those apps — these are shortcuts to help you open general user share URLs in the browser. You are responsible for compliance with each store / platform policy for your own content.

batchDialog.title: Batch summary & tab order
batchDialog.subtitle: unique tabs · order is fixed from starred channels toward extra networks.
batchDialog.triggerSteps: ① combined text to clipboard ·② first N URLs as new tabs in the same burst ·③ if checked, remaining links on clipboard again after a short delay.
batchDialog.heavyTabs: Many tabs — the browser may block them. Limit tabs in the field or keep remainder URLs on the clipboard.
batchDialog.heavyText: Very long text; some networks truncate the box — full text stays on the clipboard.
batchDialog.tabCountLabel: Number of tabs to open first (rest optionally on clipboard)
batchDialog.copyRemainLabel: Copy remaining URLs to clipboard after a delay (paste combined text into apps first; the address list arrives a few seconds later).
batchDialog.skipNextLabel: Don’t show this summary again (still appears when we consider it unsafe).
batchDialog.resetSkipToastDesc: The summary dialog will show again.
batchDialog.hostPreviewHint: Hostnames for the first addresses opened in one click — full URLs still live in the browser.

settings.title: Applied to all at once
settings.hint: Hashtag, CTA and warm sign-off show in preview and move with the batch button.

toasts.copyFailDesc: Select from preview and try Cmd/Ctrl+C, or use HTTPS.
toasts.nativeNoneDesc: Copy the content first or open channels in batch below.
toasts.longTextDesc: Places like X / Bluesky may truncate the box; full text stays on clipboard / preview.
toasts.remainderDesc: use them in order after you’ve pasted the combined text into posts.
toasts.noHref: Could not build an address to open.
toasts.noHrefGen: No URLs for the current selection
toasts.noHrefGenDesc: Check parameters or change channel selection.
toasts.clipboardReadFailDesc: Allow browser permission or try HTTPS.
toasts.clipboardOkDesc: First 280 characters look like the unified preview.
toasts.clipboardDiffDesc: Write to clipboard first or run the batch button, then verify again.
toasts.batchSentDescSyncedRemainder: {{channelCount}} channels · first {{openTabs}} tabs. In ~{{seconds}}s the remaining {{restCount}} URLs will hit the clipboard. If many tabs were blocked, allow them from the address bar.
toasts.batchSentDescSynced: {{channelCount}} channels · first {{openTabs}} tabs. If many tabs were blocked, allow them from the address bar.
toasts.batchSentDescUnsynced: {{channelCount}} channels · first {{openTabs}} tabs. If clipboard failed, copy from preview.

contextualTips.ig: Instagram: Story / Reels — copy unified text to clipboard and paste in the app.
contextualTips.wa: WhatsApp: paste for Status; “Open chat” opens a pre-filled message link.
contextualTips.yt: YouTube: after picking a video, paste into the long description field.
contextualTips.fb-mp: Marketplace: fill title + description in order; images may be required.
contextualTips.li: LinkedIn: links summarize in the post — add long copy in the post or first comment.
contextualTips.x: X: very long URLs may be limited by the browser; full text always stays in preview.
contextualTips.fb: Facebook post: link preview appears; tweak description in the composer.
contextualTips.tg: Telegram: we pass text and URL as query params to the share page.
contextualTips.rd: Reddit: pick subreddit on site; title may be shortened.
contextualTips.vk: VK: title + comment params can be used in the share form.
contextualTips.line: LINE: quick share via URL; use clipboard for extra copy.
contextualTips.hn: Hacker News: keep clipboard handy for title limits.
contextualTips.wb: Weibo: paste long body in the field.
contextualTips.bs: Bluesky: intent box may clip — full block on clipboard.
contextualTips.em: Email: combined body opens via mailto.
contextualTips.sm: SMS: carrier limits — shorten if needed.
contextualTips.md: Mastodon: check your instance field; compose box may truncate.

offlineBanner.title: You’re offline
offlineBanner.body: Text fields and unified preview still work; new tabs and remote clipboard writes need a connection.

pwaNote.body: This page is not installed as a full offline PWA; opening tabs and third-party sites may not work while offline.

page.metaDescription: Text is merged in-browser; clipboard and tab flow are transparent. Instagram, WhatsApp, YouTube and more.

tools.title: Tools
tools.campaignLogin: Sign in or use a quest parameter

charLimits.title: Length on selected channels
charLimits.ok: Length looks OK for selected limited channels.

qr.title: QR — combined text
qr.hint: Scan with your phone camera; full text stays on clipboard too.

dragOrder.hint: Tab order: drag cards to reorder

debug.banner: Share debug mode (?debug=share) — see [vanguard-share-debug] in console
